---
title: "🗓️ Unit 8 - Understanding machine learning algorithms"
---

In this week, we will review basic concepts about machine learning and decision trees.



## 👨‍🏫 Lecture Slides 

- [Machine learning basics](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vS59rUlWqYE59SjSSjhS2rlZZ_2XthvzTlbuBFM1hwJ4MAWidoQZfeVnJZ-hUzOcJIYgSrIn-h9jYRF/pub?start=false&loop=false&delayms=3000&slide=id.g1eca438a092_0_5).

- [Machine learning for Earth Observation data](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vQ4WCS4BntgpSsze-gTog9AIHbh4KQp5M9PwYBPb8UUElba1y5AMR3ge1b05p8lqTSdaeo8swGKZa1y/pub?start=false&loop=false&delayms=3000&slide=id.g23dccee849e_0_265).

🎥 

## Practical exercises

Follow [this tutorial](https://blog.gishub.org/earth-engine-tutorial-32-machine-learning-with-earth-engine-supervised-classification).

## ✍️ Coursework

🚧   
Write down what you will for your *Informe No. 2*.
🚧
